content.speakerText: I’ll send you the syllabus for that design course by Friday—should I email you or submit it online?
content.speakerTextCn: 我周五把设计课的大纲发给你，是发邮件还是在线提交？

options.text: Just send it to my personal email—I’ll forward it to the department.
You can drop it off at the library.
I don’t care as long as it’s sent before next week.
Please mail it to my home address.

content.explanation: 正确答案体现了明确的沟通方式（发邮件并转交系里），符合学术场景的正式性。干扰项中，'drop it off at the library' 不适用于电子材料；'I don't care' 显得不专业；'mail it to my home address' 与学术流程不符，通常使用学校邮箱或系统。

content.speakerText: Thanks so much for your help! How should I follow up if I don’t hear back?
content.speakerTextCn: 太感谢你的帮助了！如果没回音我该怎么跟进？

options.text: I’ll send a polite reminder after five days if I haven’t heard anything.
I’ll keep calling until someone answers.
I guess I’ll just wait forever.
Can you just call me when you’re done?

content.explanation: 正确答案体现了礼貌、主动和时间意识，符合学术沟通规范。干扰项中，'keep calling' 显得咄咄逼人；'wait forever' 消极被动；'can you just call me' 把责任推给对方，缺乏主动性。

content.speakerText: I’ve sent the application documents—how should I check if they’ve been received?
content.speakerTextCn: 我已经发送了申请材料，我该如何确认是否收到？

options.text: You can log into the portal and check the status under 'Submitted Documents'.
Just email me again and ask if I remember.
Wait a month and then complain if it’s missing.
Call the admissions office every day.

content.explanation: 正确答案提供了具体、自助式的解决方案，符合高效沟通原则。干扰项��，'ask if I remember' 不专业；'wait a month and complain' 不礼貌且拖延；'call every day' 过度打扰，不符合学术礼仪。

content.template: I’ll send the syllabus to you by Friday—should I email it or upload it to the ___?
content.hint: 学校常用系统名称，用于提交作业或材料

content.template: If you haven’t heard back in five days, just send a ___ reminder.
content.hint: 跟进时体现尊重和专业性的关键词

content.template: Could you please confirm ___ you received my documents?
content.hint: 用于间接询问‘是否’收到的正式表达

content.speakerText: Thanks so much for your help! How should I follow up if I don’t hear back?
content.speakerTextCn: 太感谢你的帮助了！如果没回音我该怎么跟进？
expectedAnswers: I’ll send a polite email after five days if I haven’t heard anything.
Could you let me know the best way to check on the status?
I’ll wait a few days and then reach out gently—thanks for your guidance!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确询问了跟进方式
语言准确性：语法正确，用词得体
表达自然度：语气礼貌、符合英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'follow up', 'polite', 'reminder', 'status' 等关键词

content.speakerText: I’ve sent the form—how do I know if it was processed?
content.speakerTextCn: 我已经提交了表格，我怎么知道它是否被处理了？
expectedAnswers: Can you let me know how I can check the status online?
Will I get an email confirmation once it’s processed?
If I don’t hear back in a week, should I email you again?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰询问确认流程
语言准确性：使用了正确句型如 'Can you let me know...', 'Will I get...' 等
表达自然度：语气礼貌、不催促，符合英语沟通习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'status', 'processed', 'confirmation', 'email' 等关键词

content.speakerText: I’ll send you the updated CV by tomorrow. What’s the best way to send it?
content.speakerTextCn: 我明天把更新后的简历发给你，最好怎么发送？
expectedAnswers: Please email it to me at j.smith@univ.edu—I’ll forward it to the committee.
You can upload it to the applicant portal under 'Documents'.
Either way is fine, but email is quicker if it’s urgent.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确提供了接收方式或建议
语言准确性：语法正确，使用了 'email', 'upload', 'portal' 等准确词汇
表达自然度：表达清晰、有礼貌、符合学术场景
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'email', 'upload', 'portal', 'forward' 等场景关键词
